mapper.select: select * from public.model_info_tab where model_name like Concat('%',#{params.modelName},'%')
select * from public.model_info_tab where model_name like Concat('%',#{params.modelName},'%')
select * from public.model_info_tab where model_id = #{params.modelId}
select * from public.model_info_tab
select * from public.model_manager_tab where used = 0 order by index
select * from public.model_manager_tab where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update public.model_manager_tab set latestupdatetime = #{latestUpdateTime}, nextupdatetime = #{nextUpdateTime}, author = #{author}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from public.model_manager_tab where id = #{id}
select * from public.model_manager_grib_details_tab where used = 0 and enabled = 0
select id,stationname,stationnum,model,status,replacetime,author,used,managerid from public.model_manager_details_tab where enabled = 0 and managerid = #{params.id} and used = 0 order by id desc
select id,stationname,stationnum,model,status,replacetime,author,used,managerid from public.model_manager_details_tab where id = #{params.id}
select id,stationname,stationnum,model,status,replacetime,author,used,managerid from public.model_manager_grib_details_tab where id = #{params.id}
select id,stationname,model,status,replacetime,author,used,managerid from public.model_manager_grib_details_tab where enabled = 0
select * from public.model_manager_details_tab where managerid = #{id} and status = 0
select * from public.model_manager_details_tab where managerid = #{id} and status = 2
select * from public.model_manager_details_tab where stationnum = #{stationNum} and used = 1
select * from public.model_manager_grib_details_tab where used = 1 and enabled = 0

select * from public.model_manager_details_tab
stationname like Concat('%',#{stationName},'%')
stationnum like Concat('%',#{stationNum},'%')
and managerid = #{id} and used = 0 and enabled = 0 order by stationname,stationnum

select * from public.model_manager_grib_details_tab
stationname like Concat('%',#{stationName},'%')
stationnum like Concat('%',#{stationNum},'%')
and managerid = #{id} and used = 0 and enabled = 0 order by stationname,stationnum
select * from ${tableName} where station_id_d = #{stationNumStr}
mapper.insert: insert into ${transName} ("station_id_c", "station_id_d", "station_name", "lon", "lat", "zone", "zone2", "enabled") values (#{stationIdC}, #{stationIdD}, #{stationName}, #{lon}, #{lat}, #{zone}, #{zone2}, #{enabled}) on conflict (station_id_d) do update set "enabled" = #{enabled}
mapper.update: update public.station_info_tab_all set enabled = 0 where station_id_d = #{stationNum}
update public.model_manager_details_tab set enabled = 1 where id = #{id}
update public.model_manager_grib_details_tab set enabled = 1 where id = #{id}
update public.model_manager_details_tab set status = 0, author = #{author}, used = 0, replacetime = #{replaceTime} where id = #{id}
update public.model_manager_details_tab set used = 1, replacetime = #{replaceTime} where stationnum = #{stationNum} and used = 0
update public.model_manager_grib_details_tab set status = 1, author = #{author}, used = 0, replacetime = #{replaceTime} where id = #{id}
update public.model_manager_grib_details_tab set used = 1, replacetime = #{replaceTime} where used = 0
mapper.select: select * from public.model_manager_grib_details_tab order by id
